title: TreAxe
subtitle: Construction operations, one connected workflow from first lead to final payment
outroNote: A production construction-operations platform. Co-built with a collaborator.

shots.caption: Role-aware dashboard with AI-detected project risks and live metrics
Lead-to-contract CRM as a drag-and-drop pipeline, with weighted forecast and win rate
Estimating and bids, with line items, statuses, and win rate across projects
Invoicing with balance and AR aging tracking
Project tracking across the full job lifecycle: budget, takeoff, daily logs and activity
One click turns an estimate into a professional client proposal: scope, costs, payment schedule, signatures
